requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — TR EAEU 004/2011 and GOST IEC 62368-1 (220–230 V / 50 Hz, Type C/F Plug)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——TR EAEU 004/2011及GOST IEC 62368-1（220–230V / 50Hz，C/F型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——TR EAEU 004/2011及GOST IEC 62368-1（220–230V / 50Hz，C/F型插頭）

summary.en: TR EAEU 004/2011 (Technical Regulation of the Eurasian Economic Union on the Safety of Low-Voltage Electrical Equipment) is mandatory in Russia and across the EAEU for mains-powered or battery-charged consumer wireless IoT devices operating within defined voltage thresholds (50–1000 V AC, 75–1500 V DC). Conformity must be assessed against GOST IEC 62368-1 (the EAEU/Russian adoption of IEC 62368-1 — Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements), which has superseded GOST R IEC 60950-1 in the harmonised EAEU standard list. The Russian electrical grid is 220–230 V / 50 Hz; Type C (Europlug, 2-pin ungrounded) and Type F (Schuko, 2-pin grounded, also known as the Soviet CEE 7/4 / GOST 7396 standard) plugs are standard. Power supplies and adapters must be rated for 220–230 V input. Electrical safety testing must be performed at an EAEU-accredited laboratory; results and conformity statement form part of the EAC Declaration technical dossier. Non-mains IoT devices (battery-only, voltage below threshold) may fall outside TR EAEU 004/2011 scope but remain within TR EAEU 037/2016 for radio aspects.
summary.zh: TR EAEU 004/2011（欧亚经济联盟低压电气设备安全技术法规）在俄罗斯及整个EAEU对市电供电或电池充电的消费类无线物联网设备（在规定电压阈值范围内运行：交流50–1000V，直流75–1500V）强制适用。合规须依据GOST IEC 62368-1（IEC 62368-1的EAEU/俄罗斯版本——音视频、信息及通信技术设备——安全要求）进行评估，该标准已在EAEU协调标准列表中取代GOST R IEC 60950-1。俄罗斯电气规格为220–230V / 50Hz；C型（欧插，双极未接地）和F型（Schuko，双极接地，亦称苏联CEE 7/4 / GOST 7396标准）插头为标准配置。电源和适配器须额定220–230V输入。电气安全测试须在EAEU认可的实验室进行；结果及合规声明构成EAC声明技术档案的一部分。纯电池供电的非市电物联网设备（电压低于阈值）可能不在TR EAEU 004/2011范围内，但在无线方面仍须符合TR EAEU 037/2016。
summary.zht: TR EAEU 004/2011（歐亞經濟聯盟低壓電氣設備安全技術法規）在俄羅斯及整個EAEU對市電供電或電池充電的消費類無線物聯網設備（在規定電壓閾值範圍內運行：交流50–1000V，直流75–1500V）強制適用。合規須依據GOST IEC 62368-1（IEC 62368-1的EAEU/俄羅斯版本——音視頻、信息及通信技術設備——安全要求）進行評估，該標準已在EAEU協調標準列表中取代GOST R IEC 60950-1。俄羅斯電氣規格為220–230V / 50Hz；C型（歐插，雙極未接地）和F型（Schuko，雙極接地，亦稱蘇聯CEE 7/4 / GOST 7396標準）插頭為標準配置。電源和適配器須額定220–230V輸入。電氣安全測試須在EAEU認可的實驗室進行；結果及合規聲明構成EAC聲明技術檔案的一部分。純電池供電的非市電物聯網設備（電壓低於閾值）可能不在TR EAEU 004/2011範圍內，但在無線方面仍須符合TR EAEU 037/2016。

standards_or_laws: TR EAEU 004/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Eurasian Economic Union on the Safety of Low-Voltage Electrical Equipment (mandatory EAEU, including Russia)
GOST IEC 62368-1-2022 — Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Part 1: Safety Requirements (EAEU harmonised adoption of IEC 62368-1)
GOST 7396-89 (CEE 7/4) — Plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar purposes (Russian/Soviet Type F standard)

summary.en: China's mandatory electrical safety standard for IT and communications equipment is GB 4943.1 (Safety of Information Technology Equipment — Part 1: General Requirements), which is the Chinese national adoption of IEC 60950-1 (the predecessor to IEC 62368-1). Compliance is enforced through the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) system administered by CNCA. A newer standard GB/T 42315 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) has been published in China, but GB 4943.1 / CCC remains the primary mandatory framework for the Chinese market. The Chinese electrical grid is 220 V / 50 Hz (same voltage and frequency as Russia), but Chinese Type I or Type A/B plugs differ from the Russian/European Type C/F sockets. CCC certification to GB 4943.1 is not accepted as equivalent to GOST IEC 62368-1 testing under the EAEU framework — separate testing is required.
summary.zh: 中国IT及通信设备的强制电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全——第1部分：通用要求），是IEC 60950-1（IEC 62368-1的前身）的中国国家标准版本。合规通过CNCA管理的CCC（中国强制认证）体系执行。较新的GB/T 42315（与IEC 62368-1接轨）已在中国发布，但GB 4943.1 / CCC仍是中国市场的主要强制框架。中国电气规格为220V / 50Hz（电压和频率与俄罗斯相同），但中国I型或A/B型插头与俄罗斯/欧洲C/F型插座不同。GB 4943.1的CCC认证不被EAEU框架接受为GOST IEC 62368-1测试的等同替代——须进行单独测试。
summary.zht: 中國IT及通信設備的強制電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（信息技術設備安全——第1部分：通用要求），是IEC 60950-1（IEC 62368-1的前身）的中國國家標準版本。合規通過CNCA管理的CCC（中國強制認證）體系執行。較新的GB/T 42315（與IEC 62368-1接軌）已在中國發布，但GB 4943.1 / CCC仍是中國市場的主要強制框架。中國電氣規格為220V / 50Hz（電壓和頻率與俄羅斯相同），但中國I型或A/B型插頭與俄羅斯/歐洲C/F型插座不同。GB 4943.1的CCC認證不被EAEU框架接受為GOST IEC 62368-1測試的等同替代——須進行單獨測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2011 — Safety of Information Technology Equipment — Part 1: General Requirements (Chinese adoption of IEC 60950-1; mandatory CCC under CNCA)
GB/T 42315-2023 — Safety of Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment (Chinese alignment with IEC 62368-1; CCC applicability to be verified with CNCA)

gap.en: The voltage and frequency match (220–230 V / 50 Hz) between China and Russia reduces the electrical design gap for power supplies, but the following gaps remain: (1) Safety standard gap — GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1-based) vs GOST IEC 62368-1 (IEC 62368-1-based) use different hazard classification approaches; a product certified only to GB 4943.1 must be re-tested against GOST IEC 62368-1. (2) Accreditation gap — EAEU-accredited laboratory testing is required; CNAS results are not accepted. (3) Plug type gap — products designed for the Chinese market with Type A, B, or I plugs are physically incompatible with Russian Type C/F sockets; power adapters or plugs must be redesigned or adapted for the Russian market. (4) Documentation gap — all conformity documentation must be in Russian. CE Low Voltage Directive compliance is not recognised.
gap.zh: 中俄电压和频率相同（220–230V / 50Hz），降低了电源的电气设计差距，但以下差距仍然存在：(1) 安全标准差距——GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1）与GOST IEC 62368-1（基于IEC 62368-1）采用不同的危险分类方法；仅依据GB 4943.1认证的产品须重新按照GOST IEC 62368-1进行测试。(2) 认可体系差距——须在EAEU认可的实验室进行测试；CNAS结果不被接受。(3) 插头类型差距——为中国市场设计的A型、B型或I型插头与俄罗斯C/F型插座物理不兼容；须针对俄罗斯市场重新设计或改装电源适配器或插头。(4) 文件差距——所有合规文件须以俄语书写。欧盟低压指令合规不被承认。
gap.zht: 中俄電壓和頻率相同（220–230V / 50Hz），降低了電源的電氣設計差距，但以下差距仍然存在：(1) 安全標準差距——GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1）與GOST IEC 62368-1（基於IEC 62368-1）採用不同的危險分類方法；僅依據GB 4943.1認證的產品須重新按照GOST IEC 62368-1進行測試。(2) 認可體系差距——須在EAEU認可的實驗室進行測試；CNAS結果不被接受。(3) 插頭類型差距——為中國市場設計的A型、B型或I型插頭與俄羅斯C/F型插座物理不相容；須針對俄羅斯市場重新設計或改裝電源適配器或插頭。(4) 文件差距——所有合規文件須以俄語書寫。歐盟低壓指令合規不被承認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TR EAEU 004/2011 electrical safety conformity (tested to GOST IEC 62368-1) is required for mains-powered or battery-charged consumer wireless devices entering the Russian market; forms part of the EAC Declaration
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4943.1 required for in-scope IT and communications equipment sold in China; administered by CNCA

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Official EAEU Legal Portal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety conformity under TR EAEU 004/2011 (tested to GOST IEC 62368-1) is mandatory for mains-powered or battery-charged wireless IoT devices entering Russia. Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certification is not accepted as equivalent; independent re-testing at an EAEU-accredited laboratory is required. Products designed for Chinese plug types (A/B/I) must be adapted to Russian/European Type C/F plugs and 220–230 V / 50 Hz input. All conformity documentation must be in Russian as part of the EAC technical dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于进入俄罗斯的市电供电或电池充电无线物联网设备，TR EAEU 004/2011（依据GOST IEC 62368-1测试）下的电气安全合规为强制要求。中国CCC / GB 4943.1认证不被接受为等同替代；须在EAEU认可的实验室独立重新测试。为中国插头类型（A/B/I型）设计的产品须改装为俄罗斯/欧洲C/F型插头及220–230V / 50Hz输入。所有合规文件须以俄语书写，作为EAC技术档案的一部分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於進入俄羅斯的市電供電或電池充電無線物聯網設備，TR EAEU 004/2011（依據GOST IEC 62368-1測試）下的電氣安全合規為強制要求。中國CCC / GB 4943.1認證不被接受為等同替代；須在EAEU認可的實驗室獨立重新測試。為中國插頭類型（A/B/I型）設計的產品須改裝為俄羅斯/歐洲C/F型插頭及220–230V / 50Hz輸入。所有合規文件須以俄語書寫，作為EAC技術檔案的一部分。
